examples: The Orangery will be decorated with copious topiaries, flowers, trelisses etc.

The playful orangery in the back of the building opens up towards the garden as a restrained but elegant box.
The site houses more than 40 listed buildings and structures including the Palm House, Temperate House, Orangery and Pagoda.
The grounds encompass expansive gardens, an orangery, a koi pond, lamp posts imported from Paris, a pool complex and tennis courts.
